Author: mathdad
Name: Senpan Companion
Punchline: Run bingo games and manage raffles from inside FFXIV.
Description: A companion UI for the Senpan App Suite server. Create and delete bingo cards (with names pulled from nearby players), run a game (draw numbers, trigger the halftime mini-game, see live winner alerts with card IDs and player names), and manage raffles (add entrants, mark them paid, draw a winner) — all by talking to your existing server over its API, so every change still broadcasts to the web UI. Open the settings with /senpan and paste a personal access token generated from your account.
